response.justification: Maria Rodriguez is a highly skilled Staff/Senior Software Engineer with 17+ years of experience — far beyond the junior/mid-level profile this role targets. Technically she is overqualified in almost every dimension: TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, and active LLM tooling work all align well with stated requirements and nice-to-haves. However, her seniority creates serious fit concerns: she would likely be under-challenged in an entry-level IC role, her salary expectations will almost certainly exceed the budget, and the retention risk is high. Worth a brief exploratory conversation only if the company is open to scoping the role upward.
strengths: Deep, production-proven TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple companies handling high-throughput systems
Covers nearly every nice-to-have: AWS CDK usage, Kubernetes cluster deployments, and current LLM/AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
Strong engineering discipline — TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, and open-source project ownership signal the clean-architecture mindset the role values
concerns: Massively overqualified at Staff/Senior level with 17 years of experience for an explicitly entry-level position, creating near-certain motivation and retention risk
PostgreSQL not mentioned anywhere in the resume; primary database experience is MongoDB and generic SQL, which is a gap given the role's stated preference
Salary expectations for a Staff-level engineer will almost certainly be incompatible with a junior/mid-level compensation band
